creator: dmk@ncf.ca
text:
Created attachment 253255
Build log with missing file

I've been attempting to update chromium, which I compile with poudriere to add in the widevine support. First few times the process died, so I cut the jobs down to one. Still died... determined it was running out of swap. So I stopped using the memory file system. So, with one job and everything on hard disk it still failed.

This time, the error was this:

../../base/gtest_prod_util.h:9:10: fatal error: 'testing/gtest/include/gtest/gtest_prod.h' file not found

I don't know a lot about the build process, so I thought I'd try enabling the tests to see if this file would then be available.

Failed again, this time on extract:

mv: rename /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/chromium/work/test_fonts to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/chromium/work/chromium-127.0.6533.119/third_party/test_fonts/test_fonts: Directory not empty

Any advice on what I can do to get this to work would be greatly appreciated.
